name: Mussel and Bacon Soup (Marguerite Patten)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mussels well and remove the beards. Discard any that are open, or do not close when sharply tapped.
2. Chop the bacon, onion, and celery.
3. Melt the margarine in a pan, add the bacon and onion. Cook for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the celery, chopped tomatoes, stock, and basil. Cook for another 5 minutes.
5. Add the mussels, cover, and cook for a further 5 minutes or until all the mussels are open. Shake the pan occasionally.
6. Discard any mussels that do not open.
7. Season with pepper.
8. Either serve the mussels in their shells or remove them before serving. In this case, provide small bowls of water on the table for dipping.
